<info anchor_id="2">
上诉人马某海因其诉迁西县人民政府（以下简称迁西县政府）作出的行政复议决定书一案，不服唐山市中级人民法院（2023）冀02行初138号行政判决，向本院提起上诉。本院依法组成合议庭审理了本案，现已审理终结。

</info>

--- Round 2 ---
<think>The <info> from section [2] reveals this is a case about "行政复议决定书" (administrative reconsideration decision). The appellant (马某海) is appealing against a judgment from the Tangshan Intermediate People's Court regarding an administrative reconsideration decision made by 迁西县人民政府 (Qianxi County People's Government).

This clearly indicates this is an "行政行为-行政复议" (Administrative act - Administrative reconsideration) case.

Let me verify this by checking the judgment result section [10] to confirm the nature of the case and get the full title of the document.</think>
<search>{"action":"open","anchor_id":"10","expected_evidence":"判决结果，确认案件类型和文书标题"}</search>
<info anchor_id="10">
依照《中华人民共和国行政诉讼法》第八十九条第一款第（一）项之规定，判决如下：
驳回上诉，维持原判。
二审案件受理费50元，由上诉人马某海负担。
本判决为终审判决。
</info>

This clearly falls under the category "行政行为-行政复议" (Administrative act - Administrative reconsideration).
